name: INFOCOM
notes:
Infocom Limited is a concern of A K Khan Telecom Limited. All these are under the umbrella of A K Khan Group. A. K. Khan and Company Limited is one of the oldest and most renowned private sector organizations in Bangladesh established in 1945.

Infocom is a trusted name in Bangladesh for Internet and Data Communication Services, Our network ensures excellent quality, high capacity, and low latency Internet connectivity. We have established our own dedicated link through an underground fiber optic via NTTN and Radio. Our network maintains redundancy of all hardware used.
